hero.title: Packers & Movers in Kolkata
hero.subtitle: Salt Lake to New Town, Ballygunge to Howrah — 850+ verified movers across Kolkata.

intro:
Kolkata's mix of colonial architecture and modern townships gives it a moving challenge all its own. Radhe packers and movers gives you 850+ verified packers and movers across Kolkata — Salt Lake, New Town, Ballygunge, Behala, Park Street, Howrah, Garia and more.

Instant quotes, transparent pricing, and vendors that understand both heritage buildings and modern high-rises.
whyUs: Kolkata's many narrow by-lanes and old buildings without lifts require experienced crews. Our vendors carry stair-handling gear, pack carefully for humid weather, and plan routes around metro and flyover construction zones.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Kolkata?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves start from ₹4,200. 2 BHK moves within the city typically cost ₹7,000 – ₹12,500.

faqs.q: Do you cover Salt Lake and New Town?
faqs.a: Yes — all of KMC and surrounding areas including Salt Lake (Sector 1-5), New Town, Rajarhat, Howrah, Ballygunge and Garia.
Yes. Our vendors have experience with old Kolkata buildings — narrow staircases, wooden floors and tight doorways.
Yes. No advance required — pay only after delivery via UPI, card, netbanking or cash.
